  • GitHub



CoinJoin Bitcoin Mixer

CoinJoin is an anonymization service that protects the privacy of Bitcoin users when they conduct transactions with each other, obscuring the sources and destinations of BTC used in transactions. It is available as open-source software and constantly developed by the bitcoin community.

  • LOW FEES
  • NO LOGS
  • 100% ANONYMOUS

Select a Cryptocurrency

CoinJoin supports Bitcoin and Bitcoin Cash.


Bitcoin
Bitcoin Cash

Select a Cryptocurrency

CoinJoin now supports both Bitcoin and Bitcoin Cash.


1Please choose coins you would like to mix


Bitcoin Mixer Options

You can adjust the settings for this CoinJoin according to your privacy requirements.

Destination BTC Address

You can receive your new Bitcoin at one or more addresses. You may wish to split up your bitcoin to prevent blockchain analysis, or simply for your convenience.
100%
Add Address

Service fee:

You can select your own fee for using the mixer service. The minimum fee is 0.1% but we strongly suggest choosing a random fee. This prevents people seeing your deposit, and then looking for an identical transaction (the output) minus a standard mixer fee.
Percentage distribution:

Transfer Delay

Delaying your pay out by one or more hours will also help add randomness to your mix. Someone looking for your output transaction on the blockchain will need to search hours of transactions, making it harder to trace. We suggest being random.
You send:
 
You receive:
Your personal fee   +   for each receiving address
Recommended transaction fee: per kilobyte

Important Information

Please carefully read and confirm you understand.
